reference: Alglave, Maranget, Tautschnig. Herding Cats. TOPLAS 2014.

sorts.Int: Event timestamps (topological ordering for acyclicity check)

function_symbols.ts_init_a: Timestamp for initial write to address a (Int)
function_symbols.rf_i: Read-from assignment for load i: index into store list (Int)
function_symbols.co_a_i_j: Coherence order: store i before store j to address a (Bool)

axioms.co_totality: ∀ addr a, stores i,j: co(a,i,j) ∨ co(a,j,i)
axioms.co_transitivity: ∀ addr a, stores i,j,k: co(a,i,j) ∧ co(a,j,k) → co(a,i,k)
axioms.po_preservation: Model-dependent: TSO preserves all except W→R; ARM relaxes all cross-addr

preserved_po: scoped-fence ordered (scope must cover both threads)

certificate_types.UNSAT_proof: No execution under the model can produce the forbidden outcome. The UNSAT core identifies the minimal set of constraints proving safety.
certificate_types.SAT_witness: A concrete execution (rf, co assignments) that produces the forbidden outcome under the model, demonstrating unsafety.
